description: Update documentation to reflect the new kmsg-based early boot logging, add the plan to docs/plans/, and update relevant steering/lessons-learned
steps: Create docs/plans/kmsg-early-boot-logging.md documenting the design decision: why kmsg, the integration points, the fallback behavior, and the MPL-2.0 license note
Update docs/log.md with a changelog entry for this feature

Update .kiro/steering/lessons-learned.md to document the pattern: 'Early boot logging should target /dev/kmsg via internal/klog package to ensure messages reach the kernel ring buffer when stderr is not visible'
Run 'golangci-lint run ./...' to confirm no issues (documentation changes should not affect this, but verify)
Commit with message: 'docs: document kmsg early boot logging design and integration'
acceptance_criteria: docs/plans/kmsg-early-boot-logging.md exists and describes the design
verification: Run 'golangci-lint run ./...' and confirm no errors
Run 'go build ./...' and confirm exit code 0
findings: golangci-lint and go build both pass cleanly. No issues with documentation-only changes.
